title: ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. baeticum
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. baeticum, also known as the Baetic star of Bethlehem, is a plant species within the ornithogalum family, characterized by its white, star-shaped flowers and sword-shaped leaves. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. baeticum include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as providing relief from muscle spasms and arthritis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
